title: Everbuild Safer Sprit – Non-Toxic – Virtually Odourless – Non-Flammable – Clear – 750ml
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
features: ENVIRONMENTALLY-FRIENDLY – A water-based white spirit alternative that is safer for people and the environment.
BIODEGRADABLE COMPONENTS – This paint cleaner contains only biodegradable ingredients and an environmentally friendly alternative to traditional white spirit.
SAFER HOME USE – Non-toxic, virtually odourless and non-flammable.
CONDITIONS – This Everbuild Safer Spirit contains a conditioning agent that keeps paint brushes soft and supple.
VERSATILE – Safer Spirit is suitable for cleaning up a wide variety of paints, including most oil-based paints.
description: Product Description Everbuild Safer Spirit is a water-based, environmentally-friendly alternative to white spirit. Use this fluid for cleaning oil and water-based paints from brushes, rollers and hard surfaces like worktops and laminate flooring, or as a degreasing fluid. This paint cleaner is made from entirely biodegradable ingredients and is non-toxic, non-flammable and virtually odourless. It contains a conditioning agent to leave your brushes soft and ready for use. Box Contains 1 x Everbuild Safer Spirit 750ml
